data.name: Tetris Girls
data.detailed_description:
遊戲簡介

這是一款 “另類”俄羅斯方塊消除遊戲，在遊戲中，你的目標是將通過消除盡可能多的方塊，生存下來並擊敗每一關的敵人，獲取獎勵。

遊戲特色

獨特的俄羅斯方塊玩法，刺激的戰鬥，精美的人物設計CG。
data.about_the_game:
遊戲簡介

這是一款 “另類”俄羅斯方塊消除遊戲，在遊戲中，你的目標是將通過消除盡可能多的方塊，生存下來並擊敗每一關的敵人，獲取獎勵。

遊戲特色

獨特的俄羅斯方塊玩法，刺激的戰鬥，精美的人物設計CG。
data.short_description: 新型方块消除考验你的手速和脑力！！还有精美的CG奖励！！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 丹麥文, 烏克蘭文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Tetris Girls
data.detailed_description:
Introduction to the game

This is an "alternative" Tetris elimination game, in which your goal is to survive and defeat enemies on each level by eliminating as many blocks as possible to earn rewards.

Game Features

Unique Tetris gameplay, exciting battles, and beautifully designed CG characters.
data.about_the_game:
Introduction to the game

This is an "alternative" Tetris elimination game, in which your goal is to survive and defeat enemies on each level by eliminating as many blocks as possible to earn rewards.

Game Features

Unique Tetris gameplay, exciting battles, and beautifully designed CG characters.
data.short_description: The new block elimination tests your hand speed and brain power! ! There are also beautiful CG rewards! !
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Turkish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Storage: 800 MB available space
